id.description: The id/iri of the web page in the Graph.

web_page.description: Represents a web page and its extracted content.

abstract.description: A short abstract or excerpt of the web page content.

date_published.description: The publication date of the web page.

headline.description: The headline or title of the web page.
headline.example: WordLift: The AI SEO Tool for Google Search

html.description: The full HTML content of the web page.

image.description: The URL of the primary image of the web page.

markdown.description: The extracted content of the web page in Markdown format.

status_code.description: The HTTP status code returned when fetching the URL.

text.description: The extracted main text content of the web page.

types.description: The RDF types for the web page entity.

items.description: The RDF types for the web page entity.

url.description: The canonical URL of the web page.

web_page.title: WebPage
